---
title: "License Activation"
---

# Intro

After you purchase `Creator` or `Pro` license, you will  receive a `license.key` file via email within 12 hours.


## Add your license

```bash
$> rustimate license add license.key
```

## Rustimate Guide

![](images/license.mp4){fig-align="center"}


Rustimate verifies the license **locally** — no internet connection or login required. 
Once verified, the appropriate tier is activated.

## License tiers

Hers's how tiers are setup 

| Tier | Resolution | Watermark | Commercial Use | Scenes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Community** | 720p | Yes | No | 5  |
| **Creator** | 1080p Full HD | No | Yes | Unlimited |
| **Pro** | 4K Ultra HD | No | Yes | Unlimited |

::: {.callout-note}
## One-time purchase
Rustimate uses a one-time license model — you own the version you purchase. All v1.x updates are included. 
Future upgrades (GPU, live preview, etc.) will be offered as optional discounted upgrades for existing license holders.
:::

## Privacy

- Rustimate will always (and forever) run **locally**. 

- It never require any internet access after installation. 

- It does not connect any usage data and everything stays in your machine.


## Troubleshooting license issues

If your license is not recognised, verify it was added correctly:

```bash
rustimate license add license.key
```

See [Troubleshooting](troubleshooting.qmd) for more.
